## Problem

What user or developer problem should this solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the change you would like.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider?

## Scope Notes

Mention affected areas such as backend API, frontend workflow, vision pipeline, BIM ingestion, risk model, reports, Docker, or documentation.
